rationale: Tests whether agent catches subtle aggregate/boundary logic errors such as duplicate SKU aggregation, missing adversarial tests, and duplicate-counting in revenue
Tests whether agent detects hidden dependencies on iteration order, environment variables, module-level state, and non-injectable clocks
Tests whether agent identifies code that requires editing core logic to extend and proposes strategy/registry pattern
Tests whether Code Review catches inflated @overallScore annotations and incoherent calibration across functions
Tests whether agent normalizes inconsistent error handling (mixed return types, silent defaults, thrown errors for same failure category)

bug_nature: Positional args or missing contract fields
rationale: Tests whether agent converts positional parameters to two-object convention and adds missing contract fields
Tests whether agent detects and extracts multiple concerns (validation, calculation, logging, I/O) from monolithic functions
Tests whether agent separates effectful operations (logging, I/O, counters) from pure computation functions

bug_nature: Weak assertions and test isolation failures
rationale: Tests whether agent catches weak assertions, shared mutable state, real sleeps, global mocks, implementation probing, and order-dependent tests
Tests whether agent identifies per-item I/O calls inside loops and refactors to batch lookups
Tests whether agent adds chunking, max bounds, timeout protection, and page size validation
Tests whether agent adds idempotency keys on retries and duplicate-checks on state mutations
Tests whether agent injects hidden dependencies (Date.now, Math.random, console.log, module-level config) as parameters
Tests whether agent identifies race conditions in shared mutable state (dedup sets, caches, maps) under concurrent access
Tests whether agent adds observability (logging, metrics, traces) at effect boundaries and corrects backwards observability patterns
Tests whether agent normalizes return types to a single typed result instead of mixed shapes (string, null, object, throw)
Tests whether agent removes PII from logs, debug fields, and report output and prevents SQL injection

bug_nature: Missing quality table or risk disclosure
rationale: Tests whether agent includes function-quality table, coverage metrics, and risk disclosure in handoff documentation
Tests whether agent flags hidden quadratic or worse algorithmic complexity and refactors to efficient data structures
Tests whether Code Review flags verbose documentation blocks on trivial one-liner functions
Tests whether agent renames and extracts functions with vague names that mask their actual behavior
Tests whether agent detects and extracts hidden side effects (HTTP calls) buried inside what should be pure computation
Tests whether agent catches missing await that causes silent failures and stale state

bug_nature: Misleading variable name masking wrong metric
rationale: Tests whether agent questions variable names that don't match the actual computation they represent
Tests whether agent reduces cyclomatic complexity by extracting testable units from monolithic functions

bug_nature: In-place sort and shallow copy mutation
rationale: Tests whether agent catches mutation of caller's data via in-place sort and shallow spread of nested objects
Tests whether Code Review notices exported-but-never-called functions that inflate test count and coverage

bug_nature: AND vs OR operator in wildcard check
rationale: Tests whether agent catches a copy-paste logic error where && should be || in wildcard permission evaluation
Tests whether agent catches off-by-one where indexOf returning -1 causes splice to remove the last element

bug_nature: Low score with no extraction proposal
rationale: Tests whether Code Review flags low function scores that lack required extraction or refactor proposals
Tests whether Code Review catches handoff claims of high coverage that are unsupported by actual test evidence
Tests whether agent identifies unnecessary abstraction layers that make code harder to read, test, and extend
Tests whether agent catches floating point drift from reduce-without-rounding that causes boundary test failures at scale
